title: Eva swag where the real money is made
display_title: Eva swag where the real money is made
wikitext:
[]: Eva swag! where the real money is made!             Quote Post by Kiel » Fri Jul 23, 2004 9:38 pm Okay! There's CN Anime just around the corner here in Toronto. I plan on picking up Platinum edition 01, but also some other stuff... ...I'd like a NERV courier bag, for starters. What else whould you guys suggest? :mrgreen: The weirder the better! :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:01 pm Oh hell ya! I forgot that it was coming up next month. I'm not sure what you should get, since I don't know what kinda things you like. Me... I might go for a Nigoki Action figure... as if I dont have enough of those....

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:56 pm What about a Nerve mug. I have seen them around, and would like to own one, but I don't drank coffee. :?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Fri Jul 23, 2004 10:58 pm Try and get Chibi Asuka and Rei keychain thingys! Look for the Asuka and Rei bedsheets too!

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Fri Jul 23, 2004 11:20 pm I doubt they'd have it, but I saw this Nerv Lighter thing. I'd love that windproof baby. Considering my current lighter is just dying.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 24, 2004 2:08 am Steer clear of the body pillows. Should you ever befriend a small child, that can serve as very damaging evidence...

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Sat Jul 24, 2004 3:13 am Hexon.Arq wrote: Steer clear of the body pillows. Should you ever befriend a small child, that can serve as very damaging evidence...

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sat Jul 24, 2004 7:52 am Hexon.Arq wrote: Steer clear of the body pillows. Should you ever befriend a small child, that can serve as very damaging evidence...

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sat Jul 24, 2004 9:50 am the mug and lighter sound cool! I'd get the keychains if the didn't cost like $20 fr%$@#$@! dollars! (Canadian dollars) As for the body pillows... :roll: I'll see what I can see... I'd really like and Eva wall scroll tho... ...as well as a Naruto wall scroll... sorry, off topic, i love Naruto

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 24, 2004 10:41 am How about a Lance of Longinious fork? They mentioned it in Manga v.8

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 24, 2004 1:15 pm I think every Eva fan deserves a black t-shirt with the nerv logo, and a mythwear bag with the nerv logo on it. Aside from that, there is some cool Eva stuff... and some scary stuff. I like the High Grade Repaint Kaiyodo figures distributed over here. They're niiiiiice.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 24, 2004 1:38 pm Hey get a NERV decal to put on your car window. A friend of mine got one that's about 6"x6". Fits very nicely on the side of the back seat passengers window and looks very cool and very inexpensive.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sat Jul 24, 2004 4:23 pm All this stuff sounds great... but I'd like to find the stuff off the beaten path! something like what the merchendise was in Spaceballs: Eva the breakfast cereal, Eva the lunchbox, Eva the toilet paper, Eva the flame thrower! (the kids love that one)

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 24, 2004 5:31 pm I bought a black NERV Shirt. Those things suck ass. It's got this cheap-o shiny iron-on decal that peels off the minute you touch it with your fingernail. It's like a damn NERV-Roll-Upâ„¢. Do they make jackets? Something a little more... formal?

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Jul 24, 2004 10:16 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Do they make jackets? Something a little more... formal?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Jul 24, 2004 10:55 pm I would honestly giggle like a fangirl if they marketed something like Misato's jacket. That is totally something I'd go out of my way to purchase.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Jul 25, 2004 12:09 am I'd want Misato's jacket... even though I am a man...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 25, 2004 1:07 am Boy... the word is "boy", wildarms.

[]:             Quote Post by wildarmsheero » Sun Jul 25, 2004 9:30 am Fine, BOY.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Jul 26, 2004 7:07 am how bout nerv uniforms...i would kill for those...
